primary.description: Primary font family for use in the system. Usually used for body content and interface items.

alt.description: Alternate font family for use in the system. Primarily used for headings.

monospace.description: Monospaced font family for use in the system. Primarily used for displaying code or for accessibility.

system-sans.value: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji"
system-sans.description: System sans-serif stack. Zero network cost; uses the platform UI font.

system-serif.value: ui-serif, Georgia, Cambria, "Times New Roman", Times, serif
system-serif.description: System serif stack. Zero network cost.

system-mono.value: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, "Liberation Mono", "Courier New", monospace
system-mono.description: System monospace stack. Zero network cost.

interface.description: Font family used for things like buttons or input fields.

heading.description: Font family used for heading elements.
